name: CEO Agent
description: Executive assistant with content intelligence and business conversation tracking. Summarizes any content (audio, video, PDF, web, text), tracks conversations across Telegram, Slack, and Fireflies meetings, generates weekly reports with CRM sync, and integrates with Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Notion, and Slack via Composio.

fields.label: Transcription API Key
fields.description: OpenAI-compatible API key for audio/video transcription. Only needed for audio/video content.

fields.label: Transcription API Base URL
fields.description: Transcription API endpoint. Leave blank to use OpenAI.

fields.label: Fireflies API Key (optional)
fields.description: Fireflies.ai API key for meeting transcript integration.

fields.label: Telegram API ID (optional)
fields.description: Telegram API ID for conversation tracking. Get from https://my.telegram.org.

fields.label: Telegram API Hash (optional)
fields.description: Telegram API Hash (paired with API ID above).
